title: Delta cinematic narrative rebuild (The Living Corpus) — concept sprint and owner-gated implementation
objective: Rebuild the /how-delta-works/ narrative's visual layer from scratch as a premium cinematic scroll experience with one persistent corpus protagonist, preserving verified scientific claims, product boundaries, accessibility semantics, the workbench CTA destination, and production safety; nothing is deployed without separate explicit owner approval.
scope: Three-direction rendered creative sprint (Living Corpus Monolith / Typographic X-Ray / Archive to Signal) under prototypes/p017-delta-cinematic-narrative/concepts/ with self-hosted OFL display typography
Anonymous contact sheets and independent blind critic scorecards under provenance/evidence/P017/concept-sprint/
Hard owner checkpoint: direction selection (A/B/C/hybrid) before full-page implementation

After selection: scroll-driven state-machine narrative (Acts I-VI), >=3 serious visual iterations with 13-position sheets and independent critics, tracked browser harness, scientific/a11y/perf verification
non_goals: Merging to main, pushing, deploying, or changing production DNS/Caddy/nginx/container/systemd/TLS configuration in this ticket
Weakening any scientific contract (R stylo canonical basis, equal MFW settings, matrix-primary hierarchy, MDS axis meaninglessness, proximity non-conclusions, alpha status)
Purchases, subscriptions, credit top-ups, or accepting new commercial terms for image/motion generation
Modifying the live P016 deployment or the workbench during the concept phase

acceptance.criterion: Three genuinely different directions are delivered as rendered HTML compositions (desktop 1440x1000 hero, mobile 390x844 hero, desktop scroll-transition state each) with anonymous contact sheets and at least three independent blind critic scorecards.
Owner selects the creative direction (A/B/C or hybrid) at the hard checkpoint before full-page implementation begins.

Final page: one persistent protagonist transformed by a continuous reversible scroll state machine across Acts I-VI; fade-up is not the primary storytelling device; mobile and reduced-motion are independently art-directed; no scientific denylist violation.

Visual acceptance rubric passes (median independent score >=90/100, no major creative category below 8.5/10, no generic-SaaS verdict, no unresolved P0/P1) with all scorecards preserved, and the page is visibly superior to P016 in side-by-side captures.
Tracked in-repo browser harness passes the full state/viewport matrix; workbench regression gates stay green; final state is NOT DEPLOYED - OWNER APPROVAL REQUIRED.

commands.command: python p017_concepts.py (Playwright: 3 concepts x desktop hero/transition + mobile hero over loopback http.server, anonymous contact sheets)
commands.result: 9 state captures + 2 contact sheets produced; fonts self-hosted (Fraunces OFL 67388B + italic 81704B + vendored InterVariable 352240B); concept HTML 13.3-20.1 KB inline each; blind panel verdict A>B>C, unanimous hybrid A+B greenlight

blockers: Hard owner checkpoint: awaiting direction selection (A/B/C/hybrid) mandated by the P017 brief before implementation may start
Single-active-ticket rule: P014 remains in-progress on main; P017 stays blocked until selection and P014 closure
